name: journeyos
description: JourneyOS hackathon MVP - AI travel operating system

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --dir server dev" "pnpm --dir client dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --dir server build && pnpm --dir client build
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir server typecheck && pnpm --dir client typecheck
